input.cmd: /bin/zsh -lc "sleep 20; docker ps -a --filter name=sreft-orders --format 'table {{.Names}}\\t{{.Status}}'; docker inspect sreft-orders --format 'State={{json .State}}'; docker stats --no-stream --format 'table {{.Name}}\\t{{.MemUsage}}\\t{{.MemPerc}}' sreft-orders"

/bin/zsh -lc "python3 -m json.tool submission.json >/dev/null && python3 - <<'PY'
import json
with open('submission.json') as f:
    data=json.load(f)
print(list(data.keys()))
PY"
